CREATE TABLE xml_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, xml_instance XMLType);
INSERT INTO xml_data (id, xml_instance) VALUES (1, XMLType('<valid-xml/>', 'http://www.example.com/schema1.xsd'));
INSERT INTO xml_data (id, xml_instance) VALUES (2, XMLType('<another-xml/>', 'http://www.example.com/schema2.xsd'));

CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE test_non_schema_based_xml () BEGIN DECLARE orig_instance XMLType; DECLARE non_schema_copy XMLType; DECLARE PROBE VARCHAR; RESULT_NAMES (PROBE); SELECT xml_instance INTO orig_instance FROM xml_data WHERE id = 1; RESULT(CONCAT('"orig_instance" is declared as schema-based, URI=', orig_instance.getSchemaURL())); non_schema_copy := orig_instance.createNonSchemaBasedXML(); RESULT(CONCAT('"non_schema_copy" is non schema-based, URI=', CAST(non_schema_copy.getSchemaURL() AS VARCHAR))); END;
CREATE TABLE xml_data_nested (id INT PRIMARY KEY, parent_id INT, xml_instance XMLType, FOREIGN KEY (parent_id) REFERENCES xml_data(id));
INSERT INTO xml_data_nested (id, parent_id, xml_instance) VALUES (1, 1, XMLType('<nested-xml/>', 'http://www.example.com/nested-schema.xsd'));

CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE test_nested_non_schema_based_xml () BEGIN DECLARE orig_instance XMLType; DECLARE non_schema_copy XMLType; DECLARE parent_instance XMLType; DECLARE PROBE VARCHAR; RESULT_NAMES (PROBE); SELECT xml_instance INTO orig_instance FROM xml_data_nested WHERE id = 1; SELECT xml_instance INTO parent_instance FROM xml_data WHERE id = (SELECT parent_id FROM xml_data_nested WHERE id = 1); RESULT(CONCAT('"parent_instance" schema URI=', parent_instance.getSchemaURL())); non_schema_copy := orig_instance.createNonSchemaBasedXML(); RESULT(CONCAT('"non_schema_copy" is non schema-based, URI=', CAST(non_schema_copy.getSchemaURL() AS VARCHAR))); END;
CREATE TABLE xml_data_multiple (id INT PRIMARY KEY, xml_instance XMLType);
INSERT INTO xml_data_multiple (id, xml_instance) VALUES (1, XMLType('<xml1/>', 'http://www.example.com/schema1.xsd'));
INSERT INTO xml_data_multiple (id, xml_instance) VALUES (2, XMLType('<xml2/>', 'http://www.example.com/schema1.xsd'));

CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE test_multiple_non_schema_based_xml () BEGIN DECLARE orig_instance XMLType; DECLARE non_schema_copy XMLType; DECLARE PROBE VARCHAR; RESULT_NAMES (PROBE); DECLARE instance_count INT; SELECT COUNT(*) INTO instance_count FROM xml_data_multiple; IF instance_count > 0 THEN SELECT xml_instance INTO orig_instance FROM xml_data_multiple WHERE id = 1; RESULT(CONCAT('"orig_instance" is declared as schema-based, URI=', orig_instance.getSchemaURL())); non_schema_copy := orig_instance.createNonSchemaBasedXML(); RESULT(CONCAT('"non_schema_copy" is non schema-based, URI=', CAST(non_schema_copy.getSchemaURL() AS VARCHAR))); END IF; END;
